subcodes.first_line: This is a Book for her who hath believed in God and was numbered among the devoted handmaidens in the Mother Book. O handmaiden of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لمن آمنت بالله و کانت من القانتات فی ام الکتاب مذکورا ان یا امه الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
